dataset_catalog.use: Human-completed rows from in-app Gold Review. Highest trust.
Base conversational seeds before premium expand.

dataset_catalog.license: Rewritten for NepTranslate; do not treat as verbatim third-party
dataset_catalog.use: Adversarially curated hard word-choice / honorific items.
Conversational train seed after gold-blocklist scrub; rewrite register.
Bulk HQ train after dedupe vs gold holdout.
Never train. Prompt seed only if fully rewritten.
Avoid for gold; optional noisy pretrain only.

items.reference: के तपाईं मलाई मद्दत गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ?

items.source: How do I get to Kathmandu?
I am looking for a taxi.

items.reference: के म फोन चार्ज गर्न सक्छु?

items.source: The air conditioner is not working.
I am sorry for being late.
Can you show me on the map?
I need change for this bill.
items.reference: मलाई यो नोटको सानो पैसा चाहियो।

items.source: Could you please look at this document?
What would you like to eat?
I will pick you up at the airport.
How long have you been waiting?
The doctor will see you shortly.
Can you show me the way to the temple?
items.reference: के तपाईं मन्दिर जाने बाटो देखाउन सक्नुहुन्छ?
आज तपाईंलाई राम्रो महसुस भएको छ?

items.source: I need to renew my visa.
Is this medicine available over the counter?
items.reference: के यो औषधि सिधै किन्न पाइन्छ?

items.source: I am looking for a room with a view.
items.reference: म राम्रो भ्यू भएको कोठा खोज्दै छु।

items.source: What time does the bus leave?
Please wake me up at six.

items.reference: के तपाईं क्रेडिट कार्ड स्वीकार गर्नुहुन्छ?

items.source: Could you write that down for me?
items.reference: के तपाईं मलाई त्यो लेखेर दिन सक्नुहुन्छ?

items.source: How much do I owe you?
Could you tell me where the nearest health center is?
items.reference: के तपाईं मलाई नजिकैको स्वास्थ्य केन्द्र कहाँ छ भनेर भन्न सक्नुहुन्छ?

items.source: Do you know if there is an ATM nearby?
items.reference: के तपाईंलाई थाहा छ, नजिकै कुनै एटीएम छ?

items.source: Can you tell me how to get to the old city from here?
items.reference: के तपाईं मलाई यहाँबाट पुरानो शहर जाने बाटो बताउन सक्नुहुन्छ?

items.source: I have landed safely; I will call you soon.
items.reference: म सुरक्षित ओर्लिएँ, चाँडै तपाईंलाई फोन गर्नेछु।

items.source: Could we see the menu, please?
I have been coughing for three days.
items.reference: म तीन दिनदेखि खोकी लागिरहेको छु।

items.source: I tried to withdraw money but the transaction failed.
items.reference: मैले पैसा झिक्न खोजें, तर कारोबार असफल भयो।

items.source: Which stop should I get off at for the museum?
Please let Grandma know I am doing well.
items.reference: कृपया हजुरआमालाई म ठिकै छु भनेर भन्नुहोस्।

provenance.note: family relay — not म ठिक छु as fine reply calque

items.source: Is lunch included in the room rate?
items.reference: के कोठाको भाडामा दिउँसोको खाना समावेश छ?

provenance.note: pharmacy location distinct from I need a pharmacy

items.reference: I am looking for a taxi.
How do I get to Kathmandu?
Under what name is the booking?
Please show me on the map.
The weather is not good today.
I want to pay the fare.
I do not like salty food.
Please do not use too much oil.
This is my first time in Nepal.
My passport is at the hotel.
